case.title: CEPERO v. PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES

opinion.h: CEPERO v. PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES, 379 U.S. 12 (1964)
CEPERO v. PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 176, Misc. Decided October 12, 1964.
opinion.p: THE CHIEF JUSTICE took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
opinion.h: BINZ v. HELVETIA FLORIDA ENTERPRISES, INC., 379 U.S. 12 (1964)
opinion.p: 379 U.S. 12 BINZ v. HELVETIA FLORIDA ENTERPRISES, INC. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF FLORIDA. No. 181, Misc. Decided October 12, 1964.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Guion T. De Loach for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
